Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to generate a list of open-ended questions that clarify the process described. The questions should cover missing details, decision criteria, roles, timing, exceptions, etc. Avoid SQL or implementation. Focus on conceptual understanding.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Possible areas: - Who initiates the process? Landlord contacts regional office. But what triggers a landlord to contact? Any prior marketing? - Documentation: What happens if documents are missing? Coordinator requests updates. How long does that take? What if landlord refuses? - Property details recording: Who ensures accuracy? Any validation? - Property manager assignment: Decision criteria listed. How are conflicts resolved? What if no manager available? - Introductory call: What if landlord is unavailable? What if disagreements arise? - Inspector/photographer: Scheduling? Who pays? What if inspector finds major issues? Landlords responsibility? - Marketing: Who creates content? How long does listing take? What if market changes? - Tenant screening: How many applicants? What if no suitable tenant? What about waiting list? - Lease finalization: Who drafts? Legal review? What about e-signatures? - Quality checks: Compliance officer, financial analyst, IT. What if they find issues? Rework? - Exceptions: Special insurance, custom clauses. How are these handled? Approval needed? - Communication: Tracked in CRM, but who is responsible for updates? - Timeline: Overall duration? Milestones? - Handoffs: Between regional office, coordinator, property manager, etc. - Scalability: How does company handle multiple properties simultaneously? - Feedback loop: Any post-onboarding review?

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Generate 10-15 questions. Make them open-ended, not yes/no.
